title: filago germanica subsp. canescens
intro: Filago germanica subsp. canescens, also known as gray cotton grass, is a subspecies of the Filago germanica plant, a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues and skin problems. The health benefits of gray cotton grass include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Gray cotton grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile plant for various medicinal uses.
